steps.reasoning: Clicked the 'Start Process' button using its ID.
The instruction is to wait for 1 second, so a WAIT action with a value of 1000 milliseconds is generated.

steps.promptLine: Wait until 'Processing... Please wait...' is hidden.
steps.reasoning: The instruction is to wait until the specified text is hidden. Since the text 'Processing... Please wait...' is not present in the current DOM, it is considered hidden. An ASSERT action with 'hidden' value will verify this condition.

actions.description: Wait until 'Processing... Please wait...' is hidden

steps.promptLine: Wait until 'Process Completed Successfully!' is visible.
steps.reasoning: The instruction is to wait until 'Process Completed Successfully!' is visible. I found an element with id 'success' containing this text and created an ASSERT action to wait for its visibility.

actions.description: Wait until 'Process Completed Successfully!' is visible
